case_title: ROBERTS, MALCOLM VS GOODMAN DAVID et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,979.00 FILED BY ROBERTS, MALCOLM AS TO DEFENDANT GOODMAN DAVID BLATTEIS REALTY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-15-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
CERT. RECEIPT TO DAVID GOODMAN (BLATTEIS REALTY) RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROBERTS, MALCOLM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOODMAN DAVID $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $520.00, IMPROPER SERVICE ON DEFT BLATTEIS REALTY. DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOT. OF JUDGMENT TO DEFEND. RETURNED, INS. ADDR.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GOODMAN DAVID BLATTEIS REALTY
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-15-1993, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO APR-15-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
